limitations: Survivorship bias: universe is current S&P 500 constituents only. Companies delisted or removed from the index during 2010-2025 are missing from the backtest, which overstates historical performance.
Transaction costs: modelled at 5 bps one-way (10 bps round-trip on rebalanced names). Actual costs may differ depending on broker, order size, and market conditions.
yfinance data quality: prices are adjusted for splits and dividends but may contain errors or stale values for thinly traded periods. No independent data validation was performed.

Point-in-time fundamentals: yfinance returns current ROA values, not historical quarterly values at each rebalance date. The backtest therefore excludes the quality factor entirely to avoid look-ahead bias. The live strategy uses current fundamentals in real time, but the backtest cannot fully replicate the live composite score.
